name: machine-i2s
description: I2S (Inter-IC Sound) audio bus interface. Used for connecting DACs, ADCs, MEMS microphones, and audio amplifiers. ESP32 has 2 I2S peripherals.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific ESP32 I2S interface.

classes.name: I2S
classes.signature: machine.I2S(id, *, sck, ws, sd, mode=I2S.TX, bits=16, format=I2S.MONO, rate=16000, ibuf=20000)

constructor_params.name: ibuf
constructor_params.description: Internal buffer size in bytes. Default 20000.

methods.name: I2S.init
methods.signature: init(*, sck, ws, sd, mode, bits, format, rate, ibuf)

methods.name: I2S.readinto
methods.description: Read audio samples into buffer (RX mode). Returns bytes read.

methods.name: I2S.write
methods.description: Write audio samples (TX mode). Returns bytes written.

methods.name: I2S.shift
methods.description: Shift data in buffer. Advanced bit manipulation.

classes.example:
from machine import I2S, Pin
import math

# Generate 440Hz sine wave
sample_rate = 16000
buf = bytearray(4000)
for i in range(1000):
    val = int((math.sin(2 * math.pi * 440 * i / sample_rate) + 1) * 127)
    buf[2*i] = val & 0xFF
    buf[2*i+1] = (val >> 8) & 0xFF

i2s = I2S(0, sck=Pin(26), ws=Pin(25), sd=Pin(22),
          mode=I2S.TX, bits=16, format=I2S.MONO, rate=sample_rate)
i2s.write(buf)
i2s.deinit()

esp32_notes: I2S pins can be mapped to almost any GPIO.
High sample rates require sufficient ibuf size.
For audio playback from WAV/MP3, use higher-level libraries.
